title: Abdallah v RL [1974] LRSC 39; 23 LLR 160 (1974) (3 May 1974)
text:
Abdallah v RL [1974] LRSC 39; 23 LLR 160 (1974) (3 May 1974)
ATEF ABDALLAH, et al., Appellants, v. REPUBLIC OF LIBERIA, Appellee.
JUDGMENT WITHOUT OPINION. Decided May 3, 1974.*

Richard A.
Diggs for appellants. Barnes for appellee.

Solicitor General

When this case was called, Counsellor Richard A. Diggs appeared for
appellants, Solicitor General Roland Barnes appears for appellee, and filed a submission for the abandonment of the charge against
appellants. After considering the submission, it is adjudged that the submission for abandonment of the case should be and the same
is hereby granted, and the appellants discharged without day. The Clerk of this Court is ordered to send a mandate to the trial court
informing it of this judgment. And it is so ordered.
� Mr. Chief justice Pierre did not participate in the decision.

160
